footer.blurb: A grand house above the Ionian Sea. Calm, white stone and true hospitality in Ksamil.

features.heading: Why choose us?
features.subheading: Every detail is designed for your comfort

sea.title: By the Sea
sea.desc: Just a 2-minute walk from Ksamil beach

breakfast.title: Breakfast Included
breakfast.desc: A rich and varied Mediterranean breakfast

bar.title: Bar
bar.desc: Refreshing drinks and cocktails by the sea

rooms.heading: Rooms & Suites
rooms.subheading: A small collection of suites, each with its own view of the Ionian.
rooms.fromPriceHint: Lowest effective available rate in the next 60 days

cta.heading: Ready for a getaway?
cta.subheading: Best price guaranteed when you book directly with us.

hero.title: Rooms & Suites
hero.subtitle: Every room is designed for tranquility and sea views.

card.fromPriceHint: Lowest effective available rate in the next 60 days

header.title: Book a Room
header.subtitle: Choose your dates and the room you want

search.heading: Choose your dates
search.priceHint: The final price is calculated for your dates using the hotel's effective rate.
search.noRooms: No rooms available for these dates — try different dates
search.pickDatesHint: Pick your dates on the calendar to continue

rooms.heading: Available rooms
rooms.emptyTitle: No rooms available for these dates.

guest.heading: Your details
guest.paymentNote: Your booking is confirmed after a secure card payment. The room is held for you for 30 minutes.

direct.smartIntro: See the best price for your dates instantly. Book direct to automatically receive our exclusive website discount.
direct.chooseRoomSummary: Choose a room to see the total.

heading.title: Get in Touch
heading.subtitle: Have a question? Write to us and we'll reply as soon as possible.

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: Our hotel was born out of a love for hospitality. Every stay is designed as a unique experience that blends modern comfort with local tradition.
story.paragraph2: With comfortable rooms, a restaurant serving Mediterranean cuisine, and a dedicated staff, we make sure every guest feels at home — only better.

staff.title: Our Staff
staff.paragraph1: Our dedicated team works every day to deliver the very best experience. From our smiling receptionists to our talented chefs, every member of our staff plays a part in making your stay unforgettable.
staff.paragraph2: We believe in genuine hospitality — not just service, but heartfelt care for every guest.

invoicePrint.hotelNonFiscalHint: Non-fiscal document — fiscalize the invoice after checkout before final printing.
invoicePrint.posFiscalSuccess: The POS invoice was fiscalized and sent to print.
invoicePrint.posFiscalPrintWarning: Fiscalization was not completed. Payment is saved; print a non-fiscal document or retry later.
invoicePrint.fiscalReady: The invoice is fiscalized and includes verification data.
invoicePrint.nonFiscalPrintHint: Payment is saved. Print a non-fiscal document now or fiscalize when internet is available.
invoicePrint.roomChargeFiscalHint: A room charge is fiscalized later on the final hotel invoice.

vatSettings.title: VAT regime
vatSettings.description: Choose it manually for this hotel. The change applies only to new invoices.
vatSettings.registeredHint: Invoices apply the rate that matches each service or product type.
vatSettings.notRegisteredHint: Invoices are fiscalized without calculating VAT.
vatSettings.mismatch: This status does not match the fature.al account. Fiscalization will be blocked until it is corrected.
vatSettings.annualTurnoverNote: Status depends on the business tax registration and annual turnover, not on the value of one invoice.

pricingPrograms.directDescription: Apply an automatic discount to the live smart price for website bookings only.

transaction.noRelatedDocuments: This transaction has no related documents.

accounts.newAccountHint: A new account starts with a zero balance — record movements under Payments or by Transfer.

salesInvoices.title: Sales invoices
salesInvoices.subtitle: All hotel and POS invoices in one register.
salesInvoices.emptyBody: Change the filters or complete a hotel/POS payment.

billCreate.title: New purchase bill
billCreate.subtitle: Record the document, purchase lines, and warehouse receipt on one page.
billCreate.missingSupplier: Add at least one active supplier before creating the bill.
billCreate.missingItem: Add at least one active item or service before creating the bill.
billCreate.detailsSubtitle: Supplier, document, and payment due date.
billCreate.itemsSubtitle: Each item is recorded as a bill line.
billCreate.emptyTitle: The bill has no lines yet
billCreate.emptyBody: Add an item or service from the catalog.
billCreate.receiveStockHint: {count} physical lines will enter the selected warehouses when the bill is saved.
billCreate.notesPlaceholder: e.g. weekly supplies, purchase order reference…
billCreate.liabilityHint: The bill creates a liability to the supplier. Cash or bank balances change only when the payment is recorded.
billCreate.stockHint: Physical items enter the warehouse selected on each line; services do not change inventory.
billCreate.stockLockedTitle: Stock from this bill has been received
billCreate.stockLockedBody: You can correct the supplier, number, dates, category and notes. Currency, total and lines stay locked to protect inventory.
billCreate.legacyTotalHint: This bill was recorded without lines. You can edit the total or add lines.

billAiImport.title: Read bill with AI
billAiImport.notConfiguredTitle: The AI assistant is not configured
billAiImport.notConfiguredBody: Add the Gemini key under Settings → AI Assistant and try again.
billAiImport.chooseDocument: Choose or drop the bill here
billAiImport.fileHelp: PDF, JPG, PNG or WEBP · up to 10 MB
billAiImport.stepReadBody: Supplier, dates, totals and line items.
billAiImport.stepMatchBody: Matches existing items without creating duplicates.
billAiImport.stepReviewBody: Nothing is saved without your review.
billAiImport.costAdjustment: Document-level tax or discount was allocated proportionally across the items. Review the costs before saving.
billAiImport.totalMismatch: The item sum differs from the bill total by {amount}. Correct the costs before saving.
billAiImport.possibleDuplicate: Warning: bill no. {number} already exists for this supplier. The system will not save it twice.
billAiImport.noItemPermission: This bill contains new items, but your account cannot create inventory items.
billAiImport.importedBody: Review the supplier, items, costs and warehouse before saving.

errors.ai_not_configured: The AI assistant is not configured.
errors.unsupported_file: AI can only read PDF, JPG, PNG or WEBP files.
errors.file_too_large: The file is larger than 10 MB.
errors.no_readable_lines: AI could not find readable line items in this bill.
errors.analysis_failed: The bill could not be read. Try again with a clearer image or PDF.

information.title: Profile Information
information.description: Update your account's profile information and email address.
information.name: Name
information.resendVerification: Click here to re-send the verification email.
information.verificationSent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.

password.title: Update Password
password.description: Use a long, random password to keep your account secure.

delete.title: Delete Account
delete.description: Deleting your account permanently removes all of its resources and data. Download anything you want to keep before continuing.
delete.confirmTitle: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
delete.confirmDescription: Deleting your account permanently removes all of its resources and data. Enter your password to confirm.

calendarPreview.title: Reservation calendar
calendarPreview.subtitle: Rooms, arrivals, departures, and availability in one operational view.
calendarPreview.dragHint: Drag across empty dates to create a reservation

calendarConflicts.alertBody: Two reservations overlap in the same room. Review them before the guests arrive.
calendarConflicts.demoNotice: This is a mock-data prototype. Choosing a solution does not change any real reservation.
calendarConflicts.realNotice: The system suggests a solution, but the reservation changes only after you confirm it. Availability is checked again before moving.
calendarConflicts.keepReservation: This reservation can remain in its current room.
calendarConflicts.noSuggestion: No available alternative room was found. This reservation requires a manual solution.
calendarConflicts.demoApplied: Demo: the conflict was resolved by choosing room {room}. Refresh the page to restore it.
calendarConflicts.confirmApply: Move the reservation to room {room}? The system will check availability again.
calendarConflicts.realApplied: Conflict resolved. The reservation was moved to room {room}.
calendarConflicts.resolutionFailed: The conflict could not be resolved. Refresh the calendar and try again.

guestProfileDesign.mockAction: This action is for demonstration only.
guestProfileDesign.completionHelp: Document and birth date are missing. AI can fill them after review.
guestProfileDesign.aiReviewSubtitle: Choose only the fields you want to apply to the profile.
guestProfileDesign.aiSafety: AI does not change anything by itself. Data is applied only after staff review and confirmation.
guestProfileDesign.appliedDemo: Mockup: the selected data was applied to the profile.
guestProfileDesign.appliedReal: The confirmed data was applied to the profile.
guestProfileDesign.aiNotConfigured: The AI assistant is not configured. Add the Gemini key in Settings → AI Assistant.
guestProfileDesign.aiFailed: The document could not be analyzed. Try again.
guestProfileDesign.aiUnsupported: For AI analysis, use JPG, PNG, WEBP or PDF up to 10 MB.
guestProfileDesign.applyFailed: The data was not applied. Review it and try again.

guestMerge.title: Merge duplicate guest profiles
guestMerge.subtitle: Choose the primary profile and the data to keep
guestMerge.safeText: Nothing disappears without a trace. Reservations, documents, invoices and reviews are transferred; the other profile is archived and the action is recorded.
guestMerge.privateSuggestion: AI receives anonymized statistics only—not email, phone or document numbers.
guestMerge.chooseDataHelp: For each field, choose the value that should remain on the primary profile.
guestMerge.finalText: “{secondary}” will be archived and everything will be transferred to “{primary}”.
guestMerge.confirm: I have reviewed the primary profile and every field that will be kept.
guestMerge.failed: The profiles could not be merged. Refresh the page and try again.

reasons.more_history: This profile has more operational history and should remain primary.
reasons.more_complete: This profile has more complete identity information.
reasons.older_profile: The profiles are similar; the older profile is recommended.
reasons.balanced: Both profiles are similar; review the selection before merging.

catalog.departuresDesc: Departures and balances that must be closed.
catalog.roomStatusDesc: The current status of every room.
catalog.inHouseDesc: Guests currently staying at the hotel.

audit.subtitle: Review the audit trail of actions and changes in the hotel.

ai.hotelContextPlaceholder: E.g. Beach hotel in Ksamil; guests are mainly Albanian, Italian, Greek, and Kosovar; peak season is July–August…
ai.hotelContextHint: This description is given to AI with the data. More specific context about guest markets, seasonality, and local demand produces more accurate pricing explanations.

checkIn.label: Check-in times
checkIn.text: Standard check-in is at 14:00 and check-out is at 11:00. If you need different times, tell us and we will do our best to accommodate you.

parking.label: Parking & access
parking.text: We offer free private parking in the courtyard. We will send the exact address and directions one day before arrival.

breakfast.label: Breakfast times
breakfast.text: Breakfast is served daily from 08:00 to 10:30 in our sea-view restaurant.

thanks.label: Thank you!
thanks.text: Thank you! We look forward to welcoming you to Villa Mucho.

reservationShow.readyDescription: The account is paid and there are no open POS orders.
reservationShow.paymentDescription: There is still a balance to collect before closing the stay.
reservationShow.ordersDescription: Close the open POS orders before continuing.
reservationShow.folioSubtitle: All charges and payments for this stay.
reservationShow.quickLinksSubtitle: Continue working without searching the menu.
reservationShow.historySubtitle: Who acted, what changed, and when.
reservationShow.minibarHint: The product is posted to the folio and deducted from the warehouse in one action.
reservationShow.minibarSuccess: Minibar was posted and stock was updated.
reservationShow.minibarError: Minibar was not posted. Check the details.
reservationShow.fiscalSandbox: Test document with no fiscal value; sandbox environment only.
reservationShow.fiscalNotConfigured: Configure and test fature.al in Settings → Integrations.
reservationShow.fiscalNotVerified: Successfully test the fature.al connection in Settings → Integrations.
reservationShow.vatNotConfigured: Choose whether this hotel is registered for VAT in Settings → Finance.
reservationShow.vatProviderMismatch: The VAT status does not match the fature.al account.
reservationShow.fiscalProductionBlocked: Production is blocked until the sandbox flow is approved.
reservationShow.fiscalAfterCheckout: Fiscalization becomes available after the reservation is checked out.
reservationShow.fiscalSinglePayment: Exactly one payment method is required: cash or card.
reservationShow.fiscalSuccess: The sandbox invoice was fiscalized successfully.

cancelled.heading: Payment was cancelled
cancelled.message: Your reservation was not completed. You can try the payment again or contact the hotel.

confirmation.heading: Thank you!
confirmation.intro: Your booking has been submitted successfully. It will be confirmed by our team within 24 hours.
confirmation.keepReference: Keep the reference number below — we will ask for it at check-in.

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.listDescription: A compact workspace for front desk and management.
maintenance.subtitle: Report, assign and track every hotel maintenance issue in one place.
maintenance.guestImpactHint: Handle immediately or move the guest to another room.
maintenance.reportHint: Room, time and reporter are saved automatically.
maintenance.problemPlaceholder: e.g. Air conditioner is not cooling
maintenance.descriptionPlaceholder: What happened and what did you check?
maintenance.blockRoomHint: The room cannot be sold until the issue is resolved.
maintenance.previewUnavailable: This file format cannot be previewed.

mock.tvDescription: During cleaning, the TV would not turn on. The outlet was checked and the remote batteries were replaced, but the issue remains.
mock.acDescription: The guest reported that the AC runs but does not cool the room. Front desk temporarily marked the room out of service.
mock.lightDescription: The light near the elevator keeps flickering and the wiring needs to be checked.
mock.safeDescription: The battery was replaced and the safe was tested successfully.

accountCenter.pageSubtitle: Manage your personal details and account security.
accountCenter.profileDescription: Update your name and email address.
accountCenter.unverifiedEmail: Your email address is not verified.
accountCenter.verificationSent: A new verification link was sent.
accountCenter.name: Name
accountCenter.roleHint: Roles are managed in Settings → Users & roles.
accountCenter.securityDescription: Use a unique password with at least 12 characters.
accountCenter.preferencesDescription: Personalize the language and view the hotel timezone.
accountCenter.timezoneHint: The timezone is managed from hotel settings.
accountCenter.deleteDescription: This action cannot be undone and permanently deletes the account.
accountCenter.deleteConfirmDescription: Enter your password to confirm permanent deletion.
accountCenter.settingsSubtitle: Operations configuration and administration in one place.
accountCenter.administrationDescription: Manage staff access and the activity trail.
accountCenter.usersDescription: Add staff, assign roles, and control permissions for every module.
accountCenter.auditDescription: See who changed reservations, payments, pricing, or settings and when.

overview.title: Inventory overview
overview.subtitle: Stock, warehouses and recent movements in one place.

lowStock.title: Low stock
lowStock.subtitle: Items at or below the minimum level.

items.title: Items
items.subtitle: Products, ingredients, consumables and services.
items.name: Name
items.openingHint: Optional. Use it only for stock already on hand before Lora.

warehouses.title: Warehouses
warehouses.subtitle: Manage storage locations and stock transfers.
warehouses.name: Name

pos.recipeHint: Stock is deducted from these components only when the POS order is completed.
pos.noRecipe: Not linked to inventory. This menu item will not change stock.
pos.insufficient: Not enough inventory stock for this item.

bill.linesSubtitle: Optional for utilities and services. Add lines when the bill purchases stock.
bill.receiveStock: Receive stock when the bill is saved
bill.receiveHint: Each stockable line creates an auditable warehouse entry.
bill.empty: This bill has no inventory lines.

currencySettings.baseCurrencyLocked: It cannot be changed because the hotel has recorded transactions.
currencySettings.manualAllRateHelp: Used when the API is disabled and stored separately for this hotel. The rate is frozen on each document.
currencySettings.baseCurrencyInherited: Inherited automatically from the hotel's base currency.

integrationCenter.title: Integration Center
integrationCenter.tenantSecureConfig: Separate configuration for each hotel. The token is stored encrypted.
integrationCenter.sandboxHint: Sandbox does not create fiscally valid documents. This is the correct configuration for staging.
integrationCenter.productionWarning: Warning: Production creates real fiscal operations. Use it only after approval and complete testing.

financeAccounts.title: Cash & Bank
financeAccounts.subtitle: An operational workspace for accounts, balances, and financial movements.
financeAccounts.changeFilters: Change the filters and try again.
financeAccounts.currencyNotice: The balance is shown only in {currency}

dynamic.subscriptionsHealthyDetail: Subscriptions are active; complete the remaining domains and integrations.
dynamic.confirmSuspendShort: Suspend {name}? The hotel cannot be opened until it is reactivated.
dynamic.hotelReady: The hotel is ready for full use.
dynamic.confirmSuspendFull: Suspend {name}? The website, panel, and reservations will be unavailable until it is reactivated.
dynamic.checkSubscriptionFields: Check the subscription fields and try again.
dynamic.newHotelSubtitle: Create the hotel and its owner's first access.
dynamic.hotelDetailsHelp: The hotel's basic information and primary address.
dynamic.slugHelp: Used in internal addresses; letters, numbers and hyphens only.
dynamic.localizationHelp: Sets the default time and currency across the PMS.
dynamic.ownerAccessHelp: Optional. When provided, the owner is linked to the hotel immediately.

compact.publicSiteAria: Open the Lora PMS public website
compact.platformHealthy: The platform is in good condition
compact.platformHealthyDetail: No overdue payments or suspended hotels.
compact.portfolioDescription: Portfolio, subscription and status in one compact table.
compact.profileSubtitle: Manage your Super Admin account details and security.
compact.profileDataDescription: Update your name and email address.
compact.name: Name

activity.title: Platform activity
activity.subtitle: A clear, scannable audit of every administrative action.
activity.immutableSummary: An immutable audit log without exposing secrets.
activity.trailHint: Select a row to see full details.
activity.immutableDescription: This activity cannot be edited or deleted. Secret values are never stored in the audit log.
activity.noResultsHint: Change or clear the filters to see results.

auto.copy006: Enable only contracted modules. Lora Core always remains active.
auto.copy015: Secret fields are never shown again. Leave them blank to keep the current values.
auto.copy024: Creates the tenant and links you as the owner.
auto.copy030: Manage the domains where users can access this hotel.
auto.copy031: Manage tenants, revenue, and platform health.
auto.copy032: Receives the admin and owner roles; they set their password through “Forgot password”.
auto.copy038: Changes apply only after they are saved.
auto.copy039: Change the search or selected filters.
auto.copy043: A summary of usage and configuration.
auto.copy047: Processes card payments in the online booking flow.
auto.copy056: Add the first domain for this hotel.
auto.copy058: Synchronizes inventory and reservations with OTAs.
auto.copy077: Subscription, configuration, and activity in one view.
auto.copy103: complete the domain and integrations so the hotel is ready.
auto.copy104: What must be completed before full use.
auto.copy109: A clear audit of every administrative action.
auto.copy110: The audit stores only changed fields, never credentials.
auto.copy127: Actions are immutable and contain no secrets.
auto.copy135: No overdue payments or suspended hotels.
auto.copy136: The platform’s operational and financial status today.
